ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player on the team */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "entry_date" TEXT /* Date when the player joined the team */,
  "height" INTEGER /* Height of the player in cm */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the player in kg */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  "contract_expiration" TEXT /* Date when the player's contract expires */,
  "player_value" TEXT /* Monetary value of the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player associated with the stats */,
  "goals" INTEGER /* Number of goals scored by the player */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Number of assists made by the player */,
  "appearances" INTEGER /* Total appearances made by the player in matches */,
  "minutes_played" INTEGER /* Total minutes played by the player */,
  "yellow_cards" INTEGER /* Number of yellow cards received by the player */,
  "red_cards" INTEGER /* Number of red cards received by the player */,
  "shots_on_target" INTEGER /* Number of shots on target by the player */,
  "shots_off_target" INTEGER /* Number of shots off target by the player */,
  "passes_completed" INTEGER /* Number of completed passes by the player */,
  "passes_attempted" INTEGER /* Number of attempted passes by the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rankings" (
  "ranking_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ranking record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player associated with the ranking */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the player based on their performance */,
  "ranking_type" TEXT /* Type of ranking (e.g., overall, by position, by performance metric) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ranking_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rankings_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "injuries" (
  "injury_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each injury record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player who sustained the injury */,
  "injury_type" TEXT /* Type of injury sustained by the player */,
  "injury_date" TEXT /* Date when the injury occurred */,
  "recovery_date" TEXT /* Date when the player recovered from the injury */,
  "injury_severity" TEXT /* Severity of the injury (e.g., minor, moderate, severe) */,
  "days_missed" INTEGER /* Number of days missed due to the injury */,
  "injury_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the injury */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("injury_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_injuries_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "league" TEXT /* League in which the team competes */,
  "established_year" INTEGER /* Year when the team was established */,
  "team_manager" TEXT /* Name of the team manager */,
  "team_stadium" TEXT /* Name of the team stadium */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "matches" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match */,
  "match_date" TEXT /* Date of the match */,
  "opponent" TEXT /* Opponent team */,
  "score" TEXT /* Match score */,
  "venue" TEXT /* Match venue */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_positions" (
  "position_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each position record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player associated with the position */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position played by the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("position_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_positions_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_awards" (
  "award_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each award record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player associated with the award */,
  "award_name" TEXT /* Name of the award */,
  "award_date" TEXT /* Date when the award was received */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("award_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_awards_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)
